steps.title: Identify the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis where $x = 0$. From the graph, this occurs at the point $(0, 2)$.

steps.title: Substitute the y-intercept into the equation to solve for B
steps.content: Substitute $x = 0$ and $y = 2$ into $10x + By = 50$: $$10(0) + B(2) = 50$$ $$2B = 50$$ $$B = 25$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
